title: Enhanced Audio: Ambience (Sound Pack)
description: Adds new ambient sounds to Minecraft to give a more immersive experience.
body:
## About
This resource pack is an optional addition to [Enhanced Audio](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-audio). However, it can also be used on top of other resource packs or by itself. Whichever you prefer. It supports versions **1.14 all the way to the latest 26.x.x**.

## Use tip
I recommend that you load this resource pack above all of your other ones.

![resourcepackrecload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76b0a391dbefd2cb677c7683b4b3d8fc31e1ade5.png)

This is to ensure that sounds are available.

## Little showcase video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jRFoHBu0LqM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## How?
Resource packs like this are able to add ambient sounds to Minecraft using the surface type walked on and entities. This can cause sound anomalies when too many sounds are involved so I will be purely focusing on ambience.
